name: Gated PDP, single LEGO product, loyalty badged
description: SFCC OCAPI Shop product document for a single gated LEGO product (the PDP view). Same badging contract as the PLP tile: product_promotions carries the promotional_price + callout_msg, and c_loyaltyBadge drives the on-page badge. Serve this so the PDP template renders the struck-through price and loyalty callout deterministically.

body.name: LEGO Star Wars Imperial TIE Fighter

images.alt: LEGO Star Wars Imperial TIE Fighter, large
images.title: LEGO Star Wars Imperial TIE Fighter

notes: promotional_price (31.99) = list (39.99) * 0.80. On the PDP the storefront shows list price struck through, the promotional_price as the member price, and the c_loyaltyBadge callout. If the shopper isn't in the group, SFCC returns product_promotions:[] and the PDP shows list price only (mirror the not-qualified product-search case).
